# julian

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/julian"
```

Package julian converts between ISO 8601 datetime strings and Julian Day numbers used by the Swiss Ephemeris.

DateTimeToJD parses an ISO 8601 datetime and returns a Julian Day with calendar metadata. JDToDateTime converts a Julian Day back to an ISO 8601 string in the specified timezone.

## Index

- [func DateTimeToJD\(datetime string, calendar models.CalendarType\) \(\*models.JulianDayResult, error\)](<#DateTimeToJD>)
- [func JDToDateTime\(jd float64, timezone string\) \(string, error\)](<#JDToDateTime>)


DateTimeToJD converts an ISO 8601 datetime string to Julian Day \(UT and TT\)

```go
func JDToDateTime(jd float64, timezone string) (string, error)
```

JDToDateTime converts Julian Day back to ISO 8601 datetime string
